Chat Edit: 'Rebuild the 6 removed loaders with the same features.
Add real tensor iteration (per-tensor notifications), multi-file/split streaming, and full cancel plumbing in the working loader.
Add an IDE/console harness to visualize progress/memory/cancel.
rebuilding the deprecated loaders next'
